game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **The Lost City** The Lost City is a classic point-and-click adventure game where players explore a mysterious, mist-shrouded city to uncover its secrets. Players navigate between static, pre-rendered scenes by tapping on directional arrows or scene transitions, and interact with the environment by tapping on various hotspots to examine objects, collect items, or trigger dialogue. Puzzles are solved by combining collected inventory items (accessed via a bottom-screen UI) with specific environmental elements, or by deciphering clues recorded in an in-game journal. Progression is linear and story-driven, unlocking new areas and advancing the narrative as puzzles are successfully completed, with the ultimate goal being to uncover the city's ancient magic and complete the central quest.
game_info.description: Explore the mysterious Lost City shrouded in ancient mist and uncover its magical secrets. Navigate through atmospheric scenes, discover hidden objects, solve intricate puzzles, and piece together the city's forgotten history. Combine inventory items with environmental hotspots to unlock new areas and progress through the story. Your goal is to find all three ancient artifacts and restore the city's power crystal to complete your quest.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes and select hotspots/items
Space: Interact with selected hotspot or use selected inventory item
Z: Open/Close inventory panel
Shift: Open/Close journal (view collected clues)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic navigation and interaction test. Validates that the player can move between scenes, select hotspots, and collect basic items without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through available scenes in a systematic pattern, interact with obvious hotspots to collect items, and verify inventory updates correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate between multiple scenes, collect at least one item, and verify the game state updates without crashes or errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win condition test. Implements optimal strategy to solve all puzzles and reach the winning state by collecting all three artifacts and restoring the power crystal.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the puzzle solution path: collect key items in correct order, use them on appropriate hotspots, unlock all areas, find the three artifacts (Sun Medallion, Moon Stone, Star Gem), and activate the power crystal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by successfully completing all puzzles and activating the power crystal with all three artifacts in inventory.
